response:
D

Step-by-step reasoning:
1. Work done against gravity depends only on the weight (mass × g) and the vertical height, not on time.
2. Both students lift the same total mass the same vertical distance, so they do the same amount of work.
3. Power is work divided by time. Mary takes less time (30 s) than Roberta (45 s) to do the same work, so Mary’s power output is greater.
